subject: FIELD — Global Sports Intelligence (One-Sheet)
body:
FIELD: Global Sports Intelligence

The fiduciary advocate for the fan's time and money.

FIELD is a single-file Progressive Web App that tells you what's worth watching tonight, what it costs, and why it matters.

Live at: https://jubilant-bassoon.jeffunglesbee.workers.dev

Built May 2026.
html:
Global Sports Intelligence
FIELD
The fiduciary advocate for the fan’s time and money.
What It Is
FIELD is a single-file Progressive Web App that answers the only question that matters when you sit down on a Tuesday night: what is actually worth watching right now, what does it cost to watch it, and why does it matter?
No algorithm optimizing for engagement. No upsell. No partner content. A pure signal — built to act as your agent, not a media company’s distribution tool.
What It Does Today
Drama Engine
Scores every live game 0–100. Playoff context, series arc, late-game situation, odds compression — unified into a single watch signal.
Watch Window
Surfaces the right game at the right moment. Tells you which quarter to tune in. Shows exactly where to stream it — with deep-links.
AI Journalism
One compound editorial call generates tonight’s brief, series previews, Scout’s Pick, and Anti-Hype note. Gemini-powered, broadcast-context-aware.
Broadcast Intel
Knows every broadcast right, RSN, crew, and stream cost for every game tonight. NBA, NHL, MLB, EPL, NFL, AFL, Tennis, Cricket, Golf — all in one slate.
What It Can Become
■ EMBER — AI editorial engine that writes live game narratives: buried leads, comeback arcs, historical context, series dominance patterns.

■ Period Intelligence — 4th-quarter scoring droughts, no-hitter detection, HT reversals: all computed from data already in every ESPN poll, zero new API calls.

■ Tournament Mode — World Cup bracket, Wimbledon draw, playoff series tracker with series margin history and rubber-band arc detection.

■ Live Odds Layer — Moneyline compression as a universal drama signal. When the market prices in danger before it resolves, FIELD surfaces it first.

■ Fan Fiduciary — Accountability audit. FIELD tracks its own pre-game picks and tells you when it was wrong. No other sports app does this.
LIVE AT
OPEN FIELD →
jubilant-bassoon.jeffunglesbee.workers.dev
